benefits.name: Domestic Airport Lounge
howToRedeem: Visit any participating domestic airport lounge listed on the RuPay Select portal (rupay.co.in).
Present your PNB RuPay card at the lounge reception desk.
An amount of ₹2 will be authorized on your card for entry validation — this is not a charge.
Enjoy the lounge. No further payment required for your complimentary visit.
termsAndConditions: Maximum 2 complimentary domestic lounge visits per calendar quarter per card.
Unused visits do not carry over to the next quarter.
Valid only at participating lounges listed on rupay.co.in. Access subject to lounge capacity at the time of visit.
Additional visits beyond the free quota will be charged at prevailing lounge rates.

benefits.name: International Airport Lounge
howToRedeem: Visit any participating international airport lounge listed on the RuPay Select portal (rupay.co.in).
Present your PNB RuPay card at the lounge reception desk.
An amount of ₹2 will be authorized on your card for entry validation — this is not a charge.
Enjoy the lounge. No further payment required for your complimentary visit.
termsAndConditions: 1 complimentary international lounge visit per calendar quarter per card.
Unused visits do not carry over to the next quarter.
Valid only at participating international lounges listed on rupay.co.in. Subject to lounge capacity.
Guest charges and additional visits beyond the free quota will be billed at standard lounge rates.

benefits.name: Gym – Cult Live (Cult.fit)
benefits.details: Home workout membership via Cult Live

benefits.name: Golf – Golftripz
howToRedeem: Log in to the RuPay Select portal at rupay.co.in with your registered card details.
Click "Redeem" under the Golf benefit and complete a ₹1 payment via the CCAvenue gateway.
Enter the OTP sent to your registered mobile number. You will receive an Order ID by email.
Within 48 hours, booking instructions and your voucher will arrive by email. Contact rupay@golftripz.com to coordinate your tee time or lesson.
termsAndConditions: 1 complimentary golf lesson or round per calendar quarter per cardholder.
Advance booking required via the Golftripz portal. Subject to course and slot availability.
Includes green fees or lesson fee and pro charges. Caddy, golf cart, or equipment rental are charged separately.
Unused quarterly entitlements do not carry forward to the next quarter.

benefits.name: SPA / Salon Service
benefits.details: Four Fountains · Kairali · Aroma Thai · O2 · Lakme
howToRedeem: Log in to the RuPay Select portal at rupay.co.in with your registered card details.
Click "Redeem" under the Spa / Salon benefit and complete a ₹1 payment via CCAvenue.
Enter the OTP sent to your registered mobile number. Note your Order ID.
Email rupay@golftripz.com with your Order ID, preferred wellness partner, date/time, city, and contact details to confirm your appointment.
termsAndConditions: 1 complimentary spa or salon session per benefit period (half-year) per cardholder.
Valid at participating wellness partners listed on the RuPay Select portal only.
Session must be pre-booked at least 24–48 hours in advance. Subject to slot availability.
Benefit is non-transferable and cannot be encashed, gifted, or exchanged for other services.

benefits.name: OTT Subscription
benefits.details: Amazon Prime OR Disney+ Hotstar OR SonyLiv — choose one
howToRedeem: Log in to the RuPay Select portal at rupay.co.in with your registered card details.
Click "Redeem" under the OTT Subscription benefit.
Choose one platform: Amazon Prime, Disney+ Hotstar, or SonyLiv — this choice is final.
Complete a ₹1 payment via CCAvenue and enter the OTP. Your subscription activation code will arrive by email within 48 hours.
termsAndConditions: Only one OTT platform can be selected per calendar year — the choice cannot be changed.
Limited to 1 complimentary annual subscription per cardholder per year.
Unused benefit cannot be carried forward to the next calendar year.
Subscription code must be activated within 30 days of receipt; expired codes cannot be reissued.

benefits.name: Medical Check-up
benefits.details: Partner diagnostic centres via RuPay Select
howToRedeem: Log in to the RuPay Select portal at rupay.co.in with your registered card details.
Click "Redeem" under the Medical Check-up benefit and complete a ₹1 CCAvenue payment.
Enter the OTP to receive your Order ID by email.
Email rupay@golftripz.com with your Order ID, full name, age, mobile number, email, city, and preferred date/time. Appointment confirmed within 48 hours.
termsAndConditions: 1 complimentary health check-up per calendar year per cardholder.
Valid at partner diagnostic centres coordinated via the RuPay Select / Golftripz portal.
Home visit available in select cities; centre visit in others. Subject to slot availability.
The standard check-up package is fixed and cannot be customised, exchanged, or encashed.

benefits.name: MakeMyTrip Discount
benefits.details: 10% off on one booking per calendar year

benefits.name: Personal Accident Insurance
benefits.details: PTD or Accidental Death · T&C apply
howToRedeem: Ensure your PNB RuPay card was used for at least one transaction within 30 days before the incident.
In the event of accidental death or permanent total disability, notify PNB or the NPCI insurance helpline promptly.
Submit the claim form along with required documents: FIR copy, medical reports, death certificate (if applicable), and card transaction proof.
The insurance team will review and process the claim within the prescribed timeline.
termsAndConditions: Cover of ₹10 lakh applies for accidental death or permanent total disability (PTD) only.
Card must have been used for at least one valid RuPay transaction within 30 days prior to the incident.
Claim must be filed within 30 days of the incident. Pre-existing conditions and self-inflicted injuries are excluded.
Coverage is valid only while the card account is active and in good standing with PNB.

benefits.name: Concierge Services
benefits.details: Personal assist · Hindi, English, Marathi, Gujarati & more
howToRedeem: Locate the RuPay Concierge helpline number on the back of your card or on the RuPay Select portal.
Call the helpline at any time — service is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
Describe the assistance you need: travel, dining reservation, or general lifestyle queries.
The concierge team will confirm details and coordinate your request within the agreed timeframe.
termsAndConditions: Available 24/7 for all eligible RuPay Select cardholders.
Covers travel assistance, restaurant reservations, event information, and general lifestyle queries.
Concierge facilitates bookings and information only. Actual third-party costs are borne by the cardholder.
PNB reserves the right to modify or discontinue the concierge benefit at any time.
